name: subagent-checkpoint

defaults.options: List options considered, recommendation, and risk if the coordinator does not answer.
defaults.resume_policy: Do not claim same-context resume unless the adapter provides a resumable session id; otherwise emit degraded artifact state.
defaults.output_format: Markdown sections: Preserved State, Question, Options, Recommendation, Risk If Guessed, Resume Mode.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Create a bounded coordinator checkpoint. State to preserve: {state}. Question: {question}. Options/risk format: {options}. Resume policy: {resume_policy}. Output format: {output_format}
